slides.title: Graceful Error Handling 🛡️
slides.content:
# Handling Errors

Network requests can fail for many reasons: no internet, server down, timeouts.

* Use try-catch around await calls.
* Check status code and throw custom exceptions.
* Show user-friendly error messages.
* Consider retry logic or fallback data.

quizData.question: What HTTP status code indicates a successful request?

slides.title: Error Handling with Timeout
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Differentiate error types

Catch specific exceptions (TimeoutException, SocketException) to give precise feedback.
